headline: Utilities Down, but Not by Much, on Defensive Bias -- Utilities Roundup
summary: Shares of power producers fell, but not by as much as the broad market, as traders sought out a defensive sector less sensitive to increases in energy commodity prices. Among utilities reporting...

headline: Xcel Energy to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: XEL heads into Q1 earnings with higher demand, new gas rates and data center growth expected to lift results despite rising costs.

headline: Gear Up for Xcel (XEL) Q1 Earnings: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Evaluate the expected performance of Xcel (XEL) for the quarter ended March 2026, looking beyond the conventional Wall Street top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining some of its key metrics for better insight.
